insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[lines] AS target USING ( SELECT #{line.letter, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS letter, #{line.nameZhTw, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS name_zh_tw, #{line.nameEn, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS name_en, #{line.color, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS color, #{line.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.letter = source.letter WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name_zh_tw = ISNULL(source.name_zh_tw, target.name_zh_tw), name_en = ISNULL(source.name_en, target.name_en), color = ISNULL(source.color, target.color), updated_at = ISNULL(source.updated_at, target.updated_at) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (letter, name_zh_tw, name_en, color, updated_at) VALUES (source.letter, source.name_zh_tw, source.name_en, source.color, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, letter, name_zh_tw, name_en, color, updated_at FROM [dbo].[lines] ORDER BY id ASC

insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[stations] AS target USING ( SELECT #{station.nameZhTw, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS name_zh_tw, #{station.nameEn, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS name_en, #{station.atm, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS atm, #{station.nursingRoom, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS nursing_room, #{station.diaperTable, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS diaper_table, #{station.chargingStation, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS charging_station, #{station.ticketMachine, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS ticket_machine, #{station.locker, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS locker, #{station.drinkingWater, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS drinking_water, #{station.restroom, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS restroom, #{station.elevator, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS elevator, #{station.escalator, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS escalator, #{station.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.name_zh_tw = source.name_zh_tw WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name_en = ISNULL(source.name_en, target.name_en), atm = ISNULL(source.atm, target.atm), nursing_room = ISNULL(source.nursing_room, target.nursing_room), diaper_table = ISNULL(source.diaper_table, target.diaper_table), charging_station = ISNULL(source.charging_station, target.charging_station), ticket_machine = ISNULL(source.ticket_machine, target.ticket_machine), locker = ISNULL(source.locker, target.locker), drinking_water = ISNULL(source.drinking_water, target.drinking_water), restroom = ISNULL(source.restroom, target.restroom), elevator = ISNULL(source.elevator, target.elevator), escalator = ISNULL(source.escalator, target.escalator), updated_at = ISNULL(source.updated_at, target.updated_at) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (name_zh_tw, name_en, atm, nursing_room, diaper_table, charging_station, ticket_machine, locker, drinking_water, restroom, elevator, escalator, updated_at) VALUES (source.name_zh_tw, source.name_en, source.atm, source.nursing_room, source.diaper_table, source.charging_station, source.ticket_machine, source.locker, source.drinking_water, source.restroom, source.elevator, source.escalator, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, name_zh_tw, name_en, atm, nursing_room, diaper_table, charging_station, ticket_machine, locker, drinking_water, restroom, elevator, escalator, updated_at FROM [dbo].[stations] ORDER BY id ASC

insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[lines_stations] AS target USING ( SELECT #{lineStation.lineId, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AS line_id, #{lineStation.stationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS station_id, #{lineStation.stationSequence, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AS station_sequence, #{lineStation.stationCode, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS station_code, #{lineStation.cumulativeDistance, jdbcType=DECIMAL} AS cumulative_distance, #{lineStation.cumulativeTime, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AS cumulative_time, #{lineStation.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.line_id = source.line_id AND target.station_code = source.station_code WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET station_id = ISNULL(source.station_id, target.station_id), station_sequence = ISNULL(source.station_sequence, target.station_sequence), cumulative_distance = ISNULL(source.cumulative_distance, target.cumulative_distance), cumulative_time = ISNULL(source.cumulative_time, target.cumulative_time), updated_at = ISNULL(source.updated_at, target.updated_at) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (line_id, station_id, station_sequence, station_code, cumulative_distance, cumulative_time, updated_at) VALUES (source.line_id, source.station_id, source.station_sequence, source.station_code, source.cumulative_distance, source.cumulative_time, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, line_id, station_id, station_sequence, station_code, cumulative_distance, cumulative_time, updated_at FROM [dbo].[lines_stations] ORDER BY id ASC

insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[station_fares] AS target USING ( SELECT #{stationFare.fromStationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS from_station_id, #{stationFare.toStationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS to_station_id, #{stationFare.fareType, jdbcType=TINYINT} AS fare_type, #{stationFare.price, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS price, #{stationFare.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.from_station_id = source.from_station_id AND target.to_station_id = source.to_station_id AND target.fare_type = source.fare_type WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET price = source.price, updated_at = source.updated_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (from_station_id, to_station_id, fare_type, price, updated_at) VALUES (source.from_station_id, source.to_station_id, source.fare_type, source.price, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, from_station_id, to_station_id, fare_type, price, updated_at FROM [dbo].[station_fares] ORDER BY id ASC

insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[lines_transfers] AS target USING ( SELECT #{lineTransfer.fromLineStationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS from_line_station_id, #{lineTransfer.toLineStationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS to_line_station_id, #{lineTransfer.transferTime, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AS transfer_time, #{lineTransfer.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.from_line_station_id = source.from_line_station_id AND target.to_line_station_id = source.to_line_station_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET transfer_time = source.transfer_time, updated_at = source.updated_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (from_line_station_id, to_line_station_id, transfer_time, updated_at) VALUES (source.from_line_station_id, source.to_line_station_id, source.transfer_time, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, from_line_station_id, to_line_station_id, transfer_time, updated_at FROM [dbo].[lines_transfers] ORDER BY id ASC
